title: BJP's M. Bhojarajan wins Ooty by 976 votes — party's first seat in Nilgiris ever
summary: BJP's M. Bhojarajan scripted history by winning Ooty by 976 votes — the party's first ever Assembly seat in the Nilgiris — after a tight three-cornered contest that went to the final round.

title: DMK retains Coonoor and Gudalur; TVK finishes second in Ooty
summary: DMK retained both Coonoor and Gudalur in the Nilgiris, while TVK's debutant pushed BJP all the way in Ooty before finishing a close second on counting day.

title: Ooty winner Bhojarajan thanks tea estate workers, promises green tea price board
summary: Ooty's BJP MLA M. Bhojarajan thanked tea estate workers in his victory speech and committed to working on a state-level green tea price board to support small growers.

title: Coonoor DMK's M. Raju announces tea leaf bonus for small growers
summary: Coonoor's re-elected DMK MLA M. Raju announced that he would push the state for a tea leaf bonus scheme aimed specifically at small and marginal growers in the hills.

title: Gudalur DMK's Dhravidamani focuses on tribal housing scheme completion
summary: Gudalur's DMK winner Dhravidamani said completion of the pending tribal housing scheme units in the Mudumalai forest fringe would be his first administrative priority.

title: Ooty tourist vehicle operators seek meeting with new BJP MLA
summary: The Ooty tourist vehicle operators' federation has sought an early meeting with new BJP MLA M. Bhojarajan to discuss permit caps, parking infrastructure and the e-pass system.

title: Avalanche-Emerald road to be widened, says Ooty BJP leader
summary: Ooty's BJP leadership announced that widening of the Avalanche-Emerald road, a critical lifeline for the catchment villages, would be taken up as a priority project.

title: Coonoor's tea auction centre records 15 percent price increase over last year
summary: The Coonoor tea auction centre logged a 15 percent year-on-year price increase in its latest weekly sale, reflecting tight high-grown CTC supply and steady export demand.

title: Pykara lake development project awaits state clearance
summary: The Pykara lake tourism development project, including a regulated boating jetty and ecotourism walk, is awaiting fresh state environment clearance, district officials said.

title: Nilgiris landslide-prone zones: new MLAs promise early warning system
summary: All three newly-elected Nilgiris MLAs have publicly committed to pushing the state to install an integrated early warning system across landslide-prone hill stretches.

title: Gudalur-Mysore interstate bus service demand raised in assembly
summary: The long-standing demand for a regular Gudalur-Mysore interstate bus service has been formally re-raised, with the Gudalur MLA committing to coordinate with Karnataka counterparts.

title: BJP's Ooty win triggers celebration across party cadre in Udhagamandalam
summary: BJP's first-ever Ooty win triggered large-scale celebrations across the Udhagamandalam town cadre on May 5, with the party announcing a public thanksgiving meeting next weekend.

title: DMK's Coonoor MLA inspects damaged ghat roads after heavy rain
summary: Coonoor's DMK MLA inspected ghat road sections damaged by the latest heavy rain spell and instructed PWD officials to commence emergency restoration works within 48 hours.

title: TVK's second place in Ooty — party says 'will focus on hills in 2027 local body polls'
summary: TVK's second-place finish in Ooty has given the party a foothold in the hills, and the state leadership has signalled a focused push in the 2027 local body elections.

title: Nilgiris Adivasi Welfare Association thanks DMK for Gudalur victory
summary: The Nilgiris Adivasi Welfare Association issued a public note of thanks to DMK after the party's Gudalur win, citing the candidate's track record on tribal land rights.
